title: ceratostylis subulata
intro: Ceratostylis subulata, also known as the needle-leaved orchid, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis subulata include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to a lack of extensive scientific research.
